body: The shared project-runtime preflight and its cmd tests are implemented and the targeted preflight tests pass, but the required broader gate `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...` still fails in pre-existing `cmd` execute-bead coverage with `excluding execute-bead cleanup metadata: exit status 128` / related `TestExecuteBead*` failures that are outside the preflight change scope. done: - Added a shared lightweight project-runtime preflight helper in `cli/cmd/project_runtime_preflight.go`. - Wired the helper into `ddx work`, `ddx try`, `ddx agent work`, and `ddx server`. - Added focused tests for missing bead-lifecycle, legacy symlink remediation, work, try, and server behavior in `cli/cmd/project_runtime_preflight_test.go`. verified: - `go test ./cmd -run 'Test(ProjectRuntimePreflight|WorkPreflight|TryPreflight|ServerPreflight)'` - `go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test(ProjectRuntimePreflight|WorkPreflight|TryPreflight|ServerPreflight)'` blocked: - `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...` still fails on existing execute-bead cases unrelated to the preflight helper. follow_up: - Investigate the existing `TestExecuteBeadContextBudgetFromConfig`, `TestInvokeExecuteBeadFromLoopParsesJSONAmidWarnings`, and `TestExecuteBeadRoutingEvidence*` failures in the broader `cmd` suite before attempting a commit.

{"base_rev":"f54eda56b6ac709e39c18eddaaf2d16178a50818","classification":"tests_red","detail":"no_changes","rationale":"The implementation and focused preflight tests passed, but the required broader gate `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...` still fails in pre-existing `cmd` execute-bead coverage (`TestExecuteBead*` / cleanup metadata exit status 128). The bead is therefore blocked by failing tests outside the preflight scope, not by missing implementation changes.","recommended_action":"investigate","result_rev":"f54eda56b6ac709e39c18eddaaf2d16178a50818","session_id":"eb-d9308084","status":"no_changes","suggested_amendments":"No code amendment needed for the preflight change itself; isolate and fix the existing `cmd` execute-bead test failures, then rerun the full gate.","suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"investigate cmd: execute-bead suite failures blocking full preflight gate"}]}

no_changes
rationale: status: needs_investigation
reason: The shared project-runtime preflight and its cmd tests are implemented and the targeted preflight tests pass, but the required broader gate `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...` still fails in pre-existing `cmd` execute-bead coverage with `excluding execute-bead cleanup metadata: exit status 128` / related `TestExecuteBead*` failures that are outside the preflight change scope.

done:
- Added a shared lightweight project-runtime preflight helper in `cli/cmd/project_runtime_preflight.go`.
- Wired the helper into `ddx work`, `ddx try`, `ddx agent work`, and `ddx server`.
- Added focused tests for missing bead-lifecycle, legacy symlink remediation, work, try, and server behavior in `cli/cmd/project_runtime_preflight_test.go`.

verified:
- `go test ./cmd -run 'Test(ProjectRuntimePreflight|WorkPreflight|TryPreflight|ServerPreflight)'`
- `go test ./internal/agent ./internal/server -run 'Test(ProjectRuntimePreflight|WorkPreflight|TryPreflight|ServerPreflight)'`

blocked:
- `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/... ./internal/server/...` still fails on existing execute-bead cases unrelated to the preflight helper.

follow_up:
- Investigate the existing `TestExecuteBeadContextBudgetFromConfig`, `TestInvokeExecuteBeadFromLoopParsesJSONAmidWarnings`, and `TestExecuteBeadRoutingEvidence*` failures in the broader `cmd` suite before attempting a commit.
result_rev=f54eda56b6ac709e39c18eddaaf2d16178a50818
base_rev=f54eda56b6ac709e39c18eddaaf2d16178a50818
outcome_reason=tests_red

{"rationale":"Bead passes 7 of 8 criteria. Title is imperative and names subsystem+change. Description has PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with file:line references (cli/cmd/work.go:106, cli/cmd/try.go:102-120, cli/cmd/server.go:98-146, cli/cmd/doctor.go:281-287), PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC is numbered 1-8 with five named Test* functions, a -run regex filter, a broad go test gate, and lefthook. Labels carry phase:N, area:*, kind:*, and spec cross-refs. Self-test passes вЂ” a cold agent can identify files, line numbers, and test targets without operator hand-curation. FAIL: criterion 7 (Parent + Deps) has a direct contradiction. The description body ends with 'PARENT + DEPS вЂ” Parent: ddx-a9d130d0. No deps.' but the bead metadata lists deps: [\"ddx-11f0cbf2\"]. An autonomous agent reading only the description body would believe there are no blocking deps and may start work before ddx-11f0cbf2 is closed, violating the DAG contract.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["Reconcile the description's PARENT + DEPS section with the metadata: replace 'No deps.' with 'Deps: ddx-11f0cbf2 (must be closed first).' so the description is the single source of truth for an agent reading it cold.","Alternatively, if ddx-11f0cbf2 is no longer a real blocker, remove it from the deps array in the metadata and leave the description unchanged."],"waivers_applied":[]}
